---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new doc, template, prompt, checklist, or script
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## What are you proposing?

- [ ] New doc (`docs/`)
- [ ] New template (`templates/`)
- [ ] New AI prompt (`prompts/`)
- [ ] New checklist (`checklists/`)
- [ ] New example (`examples/`)
- [ ] New script (`scripts/`)
- [ ] New Claude Code rule or command (`.claude/`)
- [ ] Something else (describe below)

## Gap this fills

What problem or missing scenario does this address? Why isn't an existing
file in the toolkit sufficient?

## Proposed content or outline

A rough outline, sections, or example content. It doesn't need to be
final — the goal is to validate direction before writing the full file.

## Is this language/framework-agnostic?

This toolkit must stay usable across languages, frameworks, and cloud
providers (see [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](../../CONTRIBUTING.md#what-makes-a-good-addition)).
Explain how this proposal stays generic, or if it's a scripted tool, note
whether both a `.sh` and `.ps1` version are planned.

## Are you willing to submit a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I can write this
- [ ] No, but I'd like someone else to
